3a:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\n\n# Access the stream for real-time notifications\nmem.stream.subscribe(lambda event: print(f\"New memory: {event}\"))\n\n# Detect patterns across stored memories\npatterns = mem.patterns.detect_temporal(session_id=\"agent-42\")\n\n# Incremental sync to another instance\nmem.delta_sync.push(remote_instance)\n","language":"python"}]
